posts: September’s almost behind us, it was highlighted with a new record – TON has hit an impressive 10 million active wallets this month! Interest in the network keeps growing, proving the unstoppable strength of our community! Meanwhile, we’re here to keep bringing you the freshest NFT news with #weekly_digest on TON! Dive in and enjoy. Let’s go! 📌 Lost Dogs left a little teaser! They’re launching the sequel to their game, Magic Quest, which will feature cats 🐈‍⬛ Details here . 📌 X-Empire is showing massive volume! Over 83,000 NFT vouchers sold, and demand keeps rising. Check the stats here . 📌 Roolz community sale is around the corner! The team is making moves and opening a Community Sale of their $GODL tokens in the coming days, with premium access for NFT holders. More details here . 📌 Gatto announced a new event with The Factory! Intense battles will take place in the diamond mines for a chance to win prizes and extra rewards. Read more here . 📌 Tonium World finished developing the first version of their NFT game ! You’ll be able to explore planets, extract rare resources, and trade them for mysterious rewards. Learn more here . 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

Autumn has arrived, which means it’s time to harvest! And we’re not just talking about fruits and vegetables, but also your favorite NFTs 🍂 To make the process of collecting NFTs even easier, we’re launching the long-awaited feature — the Shopping Cart! It works intuitively, just like the other features on Getgems, and here’s a step-by-step guide: 1. Explore collections and find the NFTs that catch your eye 2. Add them to your Cart with a simple click or by using the "Select" function — no need to stop at just one. By the way, this feature works with Shift + click on a computer, a long tap, or swipe on a mobile device, similar to selecting photos in a gallery 3. When you’re ready, go to your Cart, review your selection, and purchase all NFTs at once — up to 4 items on a V4 wallet and up to 100 items on a W5 wallet! In addition, you can now list multiple NFTs for sale at a fixed price and perform bulk transfers to a single address. Attention! The new functionality is currently in beta-mode, as we have implemented new technologies. At the moment, everything works perfectly with the Tonkeeper mobile app. We are awaiting full integration of W5 with other wallets. We would appreciate your feedback on using the Shopping Cart feature so we can improve it further. This update makes working with NFTs incredibly convenient! Enjoy the season of effortless NFT harvesting, gems! 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

The getgems.io marketplace is currently operating with limited functionality due to delays in the TON network. The brightest minds are doing all the necessary work to get the blockchain back up and running as soon as possible. Friendly advice: resume your NFT transactions once everything is restored. If you encounter any issues, try refreshing the metadata of your NFT by clicking on the "three dots" -> "Refresh Metadata."

Lost Dogs attended AMA session with Getgems team, check out the recording . 📌 Digital Resistance doesn't stop: the movement continues with already 6M+ people signing the Open Letter for the Freedom of speech and privacy. 📌 Fantom Fantasy Football has announced a new NFT Card tournament ! The team has prepared numerous updates and a system for hosting free tournaments. Check out the details here. 📌 Major is rolling out profile customization! You can now set any emoji status here , and these will eventually become NFTs, which is truly major. 📌 Roolz has just dropped details about their $GODL token! The creators have shared info on how to get presale access and extra airdrops for NFT holders. Check it out here . 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

The end of summer is bringing some unexpected twists: free speech and Durov, pumping dog season on TON. In the midst of all this, we’ve pulled together the #weekly_digest. Here’s what’s been going down in the world of NFTs on TON this past week. Let’s break it down. Telegram and TON are the front lines of free speech and expression. It’s a place where NFTs contribute to true ownership and independence. Together, we’re a force to be reckoned with. Join us to boost #DigitalResistance #FREEDUROV. FollowDragons has kicked off the Earlybird phase for token listings in their Holdzilla wallet. They’re also on the lookout for solid projects to list their tokens. Want a shot? Learn more here. The Roolz is hinting at something big on August 29th. It is definitely something worth a peek. Check the video here . Diamore just launched their new collection, Girls' Best Friends . With 10,000 unique cards and some bold long-term plans, this one’s worth a look. See what’s up here . Storm Trade has rolled out their Vouchers and quickly claimed a top spot on Getgems ! These Vouchers will be exchangeable for Storm tokens after launch, with staking options coming soon. 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

With just two weeks of August left, it’s time to soak up every sun ray and cross off those final to-dos! We’ve got you covered with our #weekly_digest, packed with all the latest buzz. Ready to dive into the world of NFTs on TON? Let’s go! 📌 The highlight of the week : Getgems has been crowned the best NFT app in the Tonnect Awards, as voted by the Bitget community! We’re beyond grateful for your support 😴 📌 Binance has announced Super Earn for Toncoin! The crypto exchange has introduced TON as the 56th project in their Launchpool, allowing users to stake BNB and FDUSD to earn TON. 📌 DOGS are on the prowl! The highly anticipated DOGS NFT collection is dropping soon. The app now features a section dedicated to minting and trading stickers on the NFT marketplace. 📌 Hello Ton is celebrating Telegram’s Birthday with a contest! They’re giving away prizes for a little bit of activity. Get the details here . 📌 Pugs mania : The anime world is buzzing! With 77 characters now available, including the arrival of Gojo Satoru, things are heating up! 📌 Level up with EVAA : They’re dishing out pro tips on how to boost your XP on the platform. Check out their guide for a step-by-step on maximizing your experience. Details evaaprotocol/a-probably-nothing-evaaxp -overview-fc6b115945c7 here . 📌 Tonuim World presale : The team has launched the presale of their NFT collection! Discover 118 unique planets, each brimming with rare resources and a cosmic economy to explore. 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support
The Getgems marketplace experiencing some technical issues, don't fret. The team is working on it; the website will be back up and running soon!

With two weeks of the Olympics celebrating the world's best athletes and the power of human will, we couldn’t resist taking a moment to celebrate the epic events on Getgems in 2024 🤯 - Egg Fight Club - We kicked off the year with a blast! A rock-paper-scissors TG game that roped in 1.5M players and birthed an iconic 8.5M NFT collection, using game-changing cNFT tech we managed to cut minting costs by 1100x . - Getgems Domains - February saw the rise of a new era. Building on the success of TG usernames, we launched NFT Domains aka unique links for profiles and collections on our marketplace. The result? Over 133k domain NFTs created, with total volume soaring past 215k TON, held by 50k+ collectors. - Notcoin Vouchers - March brought a fresh wave of innovation. We teamed up with Notcoin game to pioneer a new NFT collection format. Notcoin vouchers shattered records, hitting 4M+ TON in trading volume and attracting 39K+ holders. - Absurd League - Spring was all about embracing the absurd. What started as a joke turned into three wild seasons of the Absurd League. 139k absurd passport NFTs were issued to our legionnaires, 30k+ USDT was raffled off, securing us top spots at the pedestal of The Open League . - Launchpads on Getgems - We witnessed some stellar NFT sales, with the Smeshariki collection and Povel Durev stealing the spotlight, selling out in just 9 and 3 minutes, respectively. - Pearls Drops - 2024 has been all about free curated NFT drops, with over 6 releases with so far. Collaborating with talented creators, we’ve seen the interactive YNG Explorers by Soun and several Postmarks drops, with the latest one reaching a jaw-dropping 181k holders. - Lost Dogs: The Way - The legendary Lost Dogs collection added a new chapter to its story with a TG mini-app game. The dogs embarked on a quest to build a new world, pulling in 4M+ players within days and skyrocketing the collection's floor price. 2024 has been nothing short of legendary, and with the Olympic spirit in full swing, it's been a blast to look back. Let’s keep pushing—better, faster, stronger! 🤨 What’s been your top NFT moment on TON so far? 😬 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

They've also announced the rewards for the Notcoin campaign and the conditions for scoring tokens. 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

✨ Shine Bright Like SODA! ✨ Iconic GenZ make up brand SODA is dropping the SODA chan NFT collection on the TON blockchain! ☺️ ☺️ SODA chan is captivating everyone with its pop culture references and eye-catching visuals. The character features futuristic designs, shiny chrome elements, accessories, and tons of glitter. 🌟 SODA chan NFTs are an essential treasure for top collectors — zoomers, rebels, creatives, and most importantly, the extraordinary, bold, and talented girls who redefine art! 🙏 Sale Details on Getgems Marketplace 🙏 1. The SODA chan collection includes 3,000 NFTs with three rarity levels. 2. Launchpad Sale → https://getgems.io/launchpad/sodachan – 3,000 mystery boxes – Mint price per NFT: 10 TON – Limit: 10 NFTs per wallet – Duration: July 1, 09:00 AM UTC – July 15, 09:00 AM UTC – 50 NFTs reserved for the team and marketing events 3. NFTs will start revealing on July 8, so you’ll know the rarity of your doll. What perks do NFT holders get? 🌟 Guaranteed whitelist spot for future SODA drops 🌟 Airdrops in future SODA chan projects for all NFT holders 🌟 Holders of rare and legendary NFTs will receive epic drops from future project collections Join the SODA fam and stay updated: @ sodamakeup #promo #DYOR #SODAchan 🦋

🌟 Povel Durev #2: Fresh NFT Drop and Billions of Tons of Memes! 🌟 The masterminds behind the $DUREV meme coin are back with their second collection, dedicated to the greatest entrepreneur of all time! 🌟 Povel Durev #2 — 3500 fresh, epic NFTs, each available for just 12 TON. 🙏 Sale Deets on Getgems NFT Marketplace 🙏 👽 Phase 1: Whitelist Only Kicks off June 27th at 12:00 UTC, exclusively for whitelist holders on the launchpad page: https://getgems.io/launchpad/povel-durev-two − 1750 wallets have guaranteed NFT allocation connection to getgems.io with whitelisted wallet is required − 1 NFT per wallet − Price: 12 TON − Duration: 24 hours, ending June 28th at 11:59 UTC 👽 Phase 2: Public Sale − Starts June 28th at 12:00 UTC − All remaining NFTs from the 3500 supply − Up to 5 NFTs per wallet − Price: 12 TON − Ends July 1st at 12:00 UTC The first collection of poorly drawn Paul du Rove sold out in just three minutes! 1400 NFTs snugly held by 1290 collectors. And the floor on the secondary market is a solid 40 TON, with a mint price of just 15 TON! $durev is for the strong-spirited and kind-hearted. According to the team, by buying a Povel Durev NFT, you’re helping make the world a better place with tons of memes. 🤪 #promo #DYOR 🦋

🌟 What Are Pearls by Gems and How to Get Them 🌟 cNFT on TON is a unique market segment developed by the Pearls team, an experimental branch of the @ Getgems NFT marketplace. 🙏 Join the upcoming drop! WEN? Very soon! First off, cNFT is all about compressed NFTs, making it cheaper to release large-scale collections. The cNFT hype is still building as artists and collectors are just starting to explore this tech through Pearls by Gems . Pearls Drops give you the chance to start collecting NFTs and trading them with friends, totally free for all subscribers. NFTs in the Pearls collections come with different rarities, and anyone lucky enough to snag an exclusive pearl from a release can earn some TON. ❤️ 🤩 Check out the existing creations from the Pearls minting press in the special section: getgems.io/pearls We've already had the luck to collab with the creators of Lost Dogs, artist Soun, and Cheques Corp. Pearl Factory is gearing up for a new drop with the talented female artist @ OlyaBolyabooo . Follow her on social media to support the artist and keep up with her creative journey. 🤩 Make sure your wallet is connected to catch the next Postmarks release! 🤩 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

👉 Get Hyped for EURO-2024 with Fanton Fantasy Football! 👉 From June 14th to July 14th, all you football fans, TON blockchain lovers, and fantasy game junkies, Fanton Fantasy got something epic for ya! Introducing the EURO-2024 tournament with a guaranteed prize pool of $100K! 💰 The top 40% of virtual football managers who crush it in the qualifiers and dominate in the playoffs will share the grand prize of $100K. Can you play for free? Hell yeah! Register your team for the 1st Round of the qualifying tournament for free. This team can go through all 12 rounds of the qualifiers and then ball out in the playoffs. How to boost your chances of winning? You can register up to 10 squads for the FANTON EURO-2024 tourney. The easiest way to enter is during the 1st qualifying round, where the ticket price per squad is just 0.25 TON. Pro tips: - Not a football guru? Just pick the top players based on the game’s scoring system. - Want to up your game? Slide into the chat and ask the OG players which ballers to choose! Hurry and squad up before registration closes on the evening of June 14th, right before the Germany vs. Scotland match kicks off. And don’t forget, Fanton dropping the $FTON token at the end of June, and the whole community is buzzing! 🔥 Join the action, build your dream team, and compete for a share of that $100K! 🚀 😃 #promo #DYOR

On yet another Monday, the weather is still pleasing to the eye with the warm sun shining. We suggest enjoying the pleasant autumn foliage and diving into our weekly digest, where we share the freshest news from the world of NFT on TON. #weekly_digest Let's go! The most important news of the week: we are testing different options for uploading images to NFTs through the marketplace UI. We reduced them to 1000x1000, received feedback from you, and reverted back to 2000x2000px. All for the sake of ensuring our marketplace is accessible on any device and at any connection speed, as well as optimizing the free storage of your images on our servers. For NFT collections that require a larger format, the option for external centralized or decentralized storage is always available, using your own development skills. 📌 Spinner Coin launched a new crafting option! Now you can craft 1 rare NFT from 3 uncommon ones. More details here. 📌 OnTon launched a meme contest! The three best works will receive 3 NFTs from the authors. You can participate until September 24th. All details here. 📌 Cloud Friends released their Road Map ! While the team is deciding what to implement first, you can check out the details here. 📌 Hello Ton shared details about the upcoming release of their web app! The authors shared key points about the upcoming application, which you can check out here. They also pleased us with a collaboration with the meme coin BOOBA and launched a joint contest. But that's not all: there's a giveaway with simple rules happening on Twitter — click here to participate. 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

Rise and shine, gems! It’s time for your weekly fix of NFT news on TON! We’ve got all the juicy updates, so sit back, relax, and catch up on what went down this week. Salt, spice, and everything nice—let’s jump in! 📌 The biggest headline this week: TON made its debut at Korea Blockchain Week 2024! Throughout the week, TON Foundation together with other TON builders showcased the ecosystem, shared insights, and hosted events. Watch the video here . 📌 Lost Dogs: The much-anticipated cNFT collection drop went live! A record-breaking 729,000 free NFTs were sent out to their new owners. In just a few days, trading volume has already hit over 7,6k TON! Important reminder: Only 3 days left until the end of the game. 📌 Catizen dropped a new collab with Factory Craft, from the creators of The Pixels! You can now get your hands dirty as a hard worker, creating bugs as NFTs. Catizen is giving away 25 Caty-NFTs to the most active users. More details here . 📌 Roolz dropped the second episode of their anime and already scored over 5 million views! The creators also revealed info about an upcoming partnership with Notcoin. 📌 Fanton Fantasy Football continues to thrill community with exciting events , hosting both free and paid NFT tournaments , where participants can get TON-prises. 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

Getgems Twitter Spaces are so back, & we’re bringing the heat 🔥 Amidst all the chaos, we’ve secured an exclusive guest —Mad Tail, CBQIMO (chief bones quality inspector manager officer) from Lost Dogs. This is their first and only public appearance on Spaces since the game’s launch, which has hooked nearly 10 million players in just one month. We’ll be diving deep into their story—the highs, the lows, and all the wild antics of the dog pack. If we’re lucky, we might even get a glimpse into what’s next. 👨 Breaking! Mad Tail will be dropping crucial intel on vote distribution during the Spaces! 🧙‍♂️ When: Aug 29, 2pm UTC Where: Getgems Twitter Woof and awoo, bark with you soon! 👣 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

We are so back! Getgems is up and running at full capacity, with all key features—minting, stats, transaction history, and more—working smoothly. If you notice anything off, reach out to our support team at @ nfton_bot with links, screenshots, and a brief description. Huge thanks to our community for your feedback and support. 🙈

🦜 LOST DOGS: THE WAY is taking off with a bang! 🦜 "They embarked on an epic journey of endless discoveries, where, after long wanderings, they must build an entirely new world. What challenges lie ahead? It's up to us to find out..." Lost Dogs is a legendary NFT collection, that pioneered breeding mechanics on TON that generate new members of the dog pack with unique attributes from their parents and occasional mutations 🤴 A new chapter unfolds: the game LOST DOGS: THE WAY has already become a sensation in the TON community. On the very first day, over 2.5 million players joined in! On day five, the dogs introduced a thrilling Grand-Game challenge, where players must guess the least popular card. Winners can multiply their $NOT up to 6 times! 💰 Key features of the game: ➖ Mine the new $WOOF token and earn $NOT ➖ Form squads to maximize profits and refine strategies ➖ only 38 days left to play Already over 4,000,000 users have joined LOST DOGS: THE WAY. NFT floor price did x5 compared to the collection release day! Join now to help shape the future of this new civilization! 🐌 🃏 Play here: /channel/lost_dogs_bot 👾 Read the plot: /channel/lostdogscoeng/84 🃏 Lost Dogs NFT: https://getgems.io/lostdogs #promo #dyor

Autumn has arrived, which means it’s time to harvest! And we’re not just talking about fruits and vegetables, but also your favorite NFTs 🍂 To make the process of collecting NFTs even easier, we’re launching the long-awaited feature — the Shopping Cart! It works intuitively, just like the other features on Getgems, and here’s a step-by-step guide: 1. Explore collections and find the NFTs that catch your eye 2. Add them to your Cart with a simple click or by using the "Select" function — no need to stop at just one. By the way, this feature works with Shift + click on a computer, a long tap, or swipe on a mobile device, similar to selecting photos in a gallery 3. When you’re ready, go to your Cart, review your selection, and purchase all NFTs at once — up to 4 items on a V4 wallet and up to 100 items on a W5 wallet! In addition, you can now list multiple NFTs for sale at a fixed price and perform bulk transfers to a single address. Attention! The new functionality is currently in beta-mode, as we have implemented new technologies. At the moment, everything works perfectly with the Tonkeeper mobile app. We are awaiting full integration of W5 with other wallets. We would appreciate your feedback on using the Shopping Cart feature so we can improve it further. This update makes working with NFTs incredibly convenient! Enjoy the season of effortless NFT harvesting, gems! 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support

The getgems.io marketplace is currently operating with limited functionality due to delays in the TON network. The brightest minds are doing all the necessary work to get the blockchain back up and running as soon as possible. Friendly advice: resume your NFT transactions once everything is restored. If you encounter any issues, try refreshing the metadata of your NFT by clicking on the "three dots" -> "Refresh Metadata."

With two weeks of the Olympics celebrating the world's best athletes and the power of human will, we couldn’t resist taking a moment to celebrate the epic events on Getgems in 2024 🤯 - Egg Fight Club - We kicked off the year with a blast! A rock-paper-scissors TG game that roped in 1.5M players and birthed an iconic 8.5M NFT collection, using game-changing cNFT tech we managed to cut minting costs by 1100x . - Getgems Domains - February saw the rise of a new era. Building on the success of TG usernames, we launched NFT Domains aka unique links for profiles and collections on our marketplace. The result? Over 133k domain NFTs created, with total volume soaring past 215k TON, held by 50k+ collectors. - Notcoin Vouchers - March brought a fresh wave of innovation. We teamed up with Notcoin game to pioneer a new NFT collection format. Notcoin vouchers shattered records, hitting 4M+ TON in trading volume and attracting 39K+ holders. - Absurd League - Spring was all about embracing the absurd. What started as a joke turned into three wild seasons of the Absurd League. 139k absurd passport NFTs were issued to our legionnaires, 30k+ USDT was raffled off, securing us top spots at the pedestal of The Open League . - Launchpads on Getgems - We witnessed some stellar NFT sales, with the Smeshariki collection and Povel Durev stealing the spotlight, selling out in just 9 and 3 minutes, respectively. - Pearls Drops - 2024 has been all about free curated NFT drops, with over 6 releases with so far. Collaborating with talented creators, we’ve seen the interactive YNG Explorers by Soun and several Postmarks drops, with the latest one reaching a jaw-dropping 181k holders. - Lost Dogs: The Way - The legendary Lost Dogs collection added a new chapter to its story with a TG mini-app game. The dogs embarked on a quest to build a new world, pulling in 4M+ players within days and skyrocketing the collection's floor price. 2024 has been nothing short of legendary, and with the Olympic spirit in full swing, it's been a blast to look back. Let’s keep pushing—better, faster, stronger! 🤨 What’s been your top NFT moment on TON so far? 😬 👀 Follow Getgems on social media: EN Chat | Twitter | Discord | YouTube | Website | Support
